ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person making the trip */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the person belongs to */,
  "tour_type" TEXT /* Type of trip (e.g., school, work, leisure) */,
  "tour_category" TEXT /* Category of trip (e.g., mandatory, discretionary) */,
  "destination" INTEGER /* Destination of the trip */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* Origin of the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used (e.g., walk, drive, public transportation) */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in miles or kilometers */,
  "trip_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the trip in hours, minutes, and seconds */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken for the trip */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the trip (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions at the time of the trip (e.g., light, moderate, heavy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_mode FOREIGN KEY ("mode") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the person */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the person */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the person (e.g., employed, unemployed, student) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the person (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the household */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the household */,
  "number_of_cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars owned by the household */,
  "number_of_bicycles" INTEGER /* Number of bicycles owned by the household */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., single-family home, apartment, condominium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the destination */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of destination (e.g., school, work, shopping) */,
  "destination_category" TEXT /* Category of the destination (e.g., work, school, shopping, entertainment) */,
  "destination_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the destination (e.g., office building, school campus, retail store, restaurant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the origin */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of origin (e.g., home, work, school) */,
  "origin_category" TEXT /* Category of the origin (e.g., home, work, school, other) */,
  "origin_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the origin (e.g., single-family home, apartment, office building, school campus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "mode_category" TEXT /* Category of the mode (e.g., walk, drive, public transportation, bike) */,
  "mode_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the mode (e.g., walking, driving, bus, train, subway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of traffic at the sensor */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of traffic at the sensor */,
  "sensor_category" TEXT /* Category of the sensor (e.g., traffic signal, traffic camera, inductive loop) */,
  "sensor_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the sensor (e.g., intersection, mid-block, highway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person responding to the survey */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip being surveyed */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used for the trip */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was taken */,
  "survey_time" TEXT /* Time the survey was taken */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip (e.g., work, school, shopping, entertainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cms" (
  "cms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each congestion management strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the strategy is implemented */,
  "cms_category" TEXT /* Category of the strategy (e.g., traffic signal optimization, lane management, ramp metering) */,
  "cms_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the strategy (e.g., coordinated signal timing, dynamic lane management, ramp metering with dynamic pricing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in miles or kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intersections" (
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intersection */,
  "intersection_name" TEXT /* Name of the intersection */,
  "intersection_description" TEXT /* Description of the intersection */,
  "intersection_location" TEXT /* Location of the intersection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_volume" (
  "traffic_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic volume record */,
  "traffic_volume_date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic volume data */,
  "traffic_volume_time" TEXT /* Time of the traffic volume data */,
  "traffic_volume_count" INTEGER /* Count of traffic volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_volume_id")
)
